programmes.show_description: It Was All Of Them. Divorced mum Krystal is delighted when she marries single dad Nathan. Little does she know, her blended family will soon turn into a nightmare. S7, Ep19
Put Yourself Out There. Randy Ferguson's life changes forever when he meets single mother, Angela Phillips. But the beautiful life they build together hides an ugly secret. S7, Ep20
The Rent Check. When an Army veteran vanishes from her apartment, investigators devise a unique surveillance strategy to find her. They uncover disturbing evidence. S7, Ep19

Women Who Kill. A chilling look at the work of female killers. They can be as deadly as their male counterparts, but they choose less violent methods. S3, Ep8

Prescription For Murder. After church-going mother, Marilyn Reza, is found dead in her home, officers suspect parishioners. A secret confession at her funeral reveals the killer. S3, Ep7

The Granny Killer. A young mother finally escapes her violent husband, unaware he'll soon be arrested after a deadly killing spree targeting elderly women. S10, Ep20
